svg.text: TCP flags, protocol ID, connection state, bidirectional packet/byte counts, flow stats (mean, stddev, sum, min, max, rate)
Total bytes per src/dst IP, total packets per src/dst IP, per-protocol packet counts, per-destination-port counts
Attack rates per protocol per IP, inbound connection counts per IP, packets per (state × protocol × IP) cross-dimension
context_score = Σ weight_i × dim_score_i (not trained — pure rule layer)
All 32 features feed XGBoost → calibrated probabilities → LSTM → context layer → alert
Context weights sum to 1.0 | network (0.30) is highest — most directly observable signal
